ValidationRule.description: Does not allow to manually change the allowance due to %
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Quote.ProjectManagementBillingType__c,"AllowancePercent"), ProjectManagementAllowancePackage__c =true, OR( ISCHANGED( UnitPrice ), ISCHANGED( Quantity ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can not change the Project Management Allowance since it is calculated automatically due to the setting on the quote. (QL009)
